'''sanopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadhook|wadhook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadhook|wadhook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sanopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænepeth|sænepeth]] || [[word:sænepej|sænepej]] || [[word:sænepesh|sænepesh]] || [[word:sænepe|sænepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sanonopoth|sanonopoth]] || [[word:sanonopoj|sanonopoj]] || [[word:sanonoposh|sanonoposh]] || [[word:sanonopo|sanonopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanopoth|sanopoth]] || [[word:sanopoj|sanopoj]] || [[word:sanoposh|sanoposh]] || [[word:sanopo|sanopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanofpoth|sanofpoth]] || [[word:sanofpoj|sanofpoj]] || [[word:sanofposh|sanofposh]] || [[word:sanofpof|sanofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanopotho|sanopotho]] || [[word:sanopojo|sanopojo]] || [[word:sanoposho|sanoposho]] || [[word:sanopoko|sanopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanopoth|sanopoth]] || [[word:sanopoj|sanopoj]] || [[word:sanoposh|sanoposh]] || [[word:sanopo|sanopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanopothol|sanopothol]] || [[word:sanopojol|sanopojol]] || [[word:sanoposhol|sanoposhol]] || [[word:sanopokol|sanopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanopothotho|sanopothotho]] || [[word:sanopojojo|sanopojojo]] || [[word:sanoposhosho|sanoposhosho]] || [[word:sanopoko|sanopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanopothon|sanopothon]] || [[word:sanopojon|sanopojon]] || [[word:sanoposhon|sanoposhon]] || [[word:sanopokon|sanopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanopothoro|sanopothoro]] || [[word:sanopojoro|sanopojoro]] || [[word:sanoposhoro|sanoposhoro]] || [[word:sanopokoro|sanopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
